def modify_features(df_input) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """
    Thought 1: The absolute difference between Left-Weight and Right-Weight can capture the imbalance in weight distribution.
    New Feature 1: weight_difference | weight_difference = abs(Left-Weight - Right-Weight)
    """
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    """
    Thought: To enhance the model performance, we will leverage the provided advanced operators to generate new features that capture the relationships between distance and weight imbalances. We calculate the Sqrt, Log, Residual, Rank features, and combine categorical variables to get new insights.
    New features: New Feature 1: abs_weight_diff | weight_difference = abs(Left-Weight - Right-Weight). 
    New Feature 2: distance_sqrt | distance_sqrt = sqrt(distance_difference). 
    New Feature 3: log_distance_diff | log_distance_diff = log(distance_difference + 1) to handle near zero values. 
    New Feature 4: weight_ratio_sqrt | weight_ratio_sqrt = sqrt(weight_ratio). 
    New Feature 5: weight_ratio_log | weight_ratio_log = log(weight_ratio + 1) to handle near zero values. 
    New Feature 6: weight_residuals | weight_residuals = Left-Weight - Right-Weight. 
    New Feature 7: distance_residuals | distance_residuals = distance_difference - distance_balance. 
    New Feature 8: weight_difference_rank | weight_difference_rank = rankdata(weight_difference). 
    New Feature 9: distance_difference_rank | distance_difference_rank = rankdata(distance_difference). 
    New Feature 10: weight_ratio_rank | weight_ratio_rank = rankdata(weight_ratio). 

    We also calculate the minimum and maximum of grouped categorical variables to get new insights.
    """
    df_output = df_input.copy()
    
    # Calculate absolute difference between Left-Weight and Right-Weight
    df_output['weight_difference'] = abs(df_output['Left-Weight'] - df_output['Right-Weight'])
    
    # Calculate sqrt of distance_difference
    df_output['distance_sqrt'] = np.sqrt(df_output['distance_difference'])
    
    # Calculate log of distance_difference to handle near zero values
    df_output['log_distance_diff'] = np.log(df_output['distance_difference'] + 1)
    
    # Calculate sqrt of weight_ratio
    df_output['weight_ratio_sqrt'] = np.sqrt(df_output['weight_ratio'])
    
    # Calculate log of weight_ratio to handle near zero values
    df_output['weight_ratio_log'] = np.log(df_output['weight_ratio'] + 1)
